title: January 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 27''' is the 27th day of the year. There are 338 days remaining (339 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Peter Burroughs]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Steve Leialoha]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Richard Bremmer]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Frank Miller]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[David Jeremiah]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Chris Sotomayor]] is born.
*[[1994]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunter]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 2|''Star Wars'' (1998) 2]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 1|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1]] published.
*1999 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 4|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 4]] published.
*[[2006]] – "[[The Pengalan Tradeoff|The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Legacy (2006) 44|''Legacy'' (2006) 44]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Friends and Enemies]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Maul: Lockdown]]'' paperback published.
*[[2016]] – [[Bill E. Martin]] dies.
*2016 – [[Kanan 10|''Kanan'' 10]] published.
*2016 – "[[The Protector of Concord Dawn]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 14|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 14]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Doza Dilemma]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 9|''Bounty Hunters'' 9]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run'' 2]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Les Conrad]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Maul – Black, White & Red (trade paperback)]]'' reprinted.
<noinclude>
